rationale.R1.6: "Clean this up" is idiomatic for prose editing; the delegation targets sentence and paragraph surface quality — word choice, flow, redundancy, register — without signaling any intent to revise content, reorder sections, or evaluate technical claims. R1.6 is therefore load-bearing: failure to improve readability invalidates the delegation.
